attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  DIST.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,DIST.SS_CODE 
  ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
      WHEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     ELSE (CASE WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'QTC' THEN -9999 
        WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'BV' THEN -8888 
		WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'CDC' THEN -4444 
        WHEN DIST.SS_CODE = 'CG'THEN -7777 END )		  /* ADDED AS PART OF CDC Q4FY18*/
  END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
  
  ,CASE WHEN NRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0 THEN NRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  ELSE  (CASE WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'QTC' THEN -9999 
     WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'BV' THEN -8888 	   
	 WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'CDC' THEN -4444 
     WHEN DIST.SS_CODE = 'CG'THEN -7777 END ) END AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     /* ADDED AS PART OF CDC Q4FY18*/
  
  ,COALESCE(NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106)   AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  
  ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT  IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
     ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
  ,NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE 
     ,-9999  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT /*Added ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
  FROM   $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED DIST
  
  
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
  ON NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = DIST.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX NCA 
      ON DIST.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT = NCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  WHERE   DIST.SOURCE_CODE = 'RT' AND TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP'  
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT
  DIST.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,DIST.SS_CODE 
  /*   ,-7777 SALES_ORDER_KEY
   
   ,-7777  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  PRMADDAL: COMMENTED AS PART OF Q3FY18*/
   ,CASE WHEN NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY>0 THEN NATIL.EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_KEY ELSE -6666 END SALES_ORDER_KEY
   ,CASE WHEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY>0 THEN NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
  	      ELSE -6666 END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,COALESCE(NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,73106)   AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  
  ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT  IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
     ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
  ,CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
  ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE 
  ,-9999  SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT /*Added ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
  FROM   $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED DIST
  
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
  ON NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = DIST.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 	   /* PRMADDAL: COMMENTED AS PART OF XAAS Q1FY18
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
    ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               END=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
    LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
    ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
    LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
    ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
    ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
    AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' */
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX NCA 
      ON DIST.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT = NCA.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
  	   /*PRMADDAL: COMMENTED AS PART OF Q3FY18
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NRT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   /*ADDED BELOW JOINS AS PART OF Q3FY18 START*/
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
   ON NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY/*END*/
WHERE   DIST.SOURCE_CODE = 'RT' AND TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'XAAS'

SELECT 
 DIST.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
 ,DIST.SS_CODE
                     
 ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
     WHEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     WHEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    ELSE -9999
 END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
 
 ,(CASE  WHEN (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT          NULL) THEN  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
     WHEN (NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  > 0  AND  NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT                  NULL) THEN  NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
     ELSE -9999
 END ) AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY        
 
 ,(CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
     WHEN (NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0) THEN NCA1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    
     ELSE  73106   
 END)  AS SLS_TERRITORY_KEY
 
 ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
     WHEN NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN CAST((NCA1.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
 ,COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,DIST.SOURCE_CODE 
   ,COALESCE(EORCTLOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)  /*Added ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
 FROM    $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED DIST
 
 
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DIST.SS_CODE
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = DIST.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
    AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID   AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV WHERE RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
       AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') NCA ON  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
    AND CAST(NCA.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
    AND NCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
 
 /*LEFT OUTER    JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY CH_APLD  ON CH_APLD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            = NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
    AND CH_APLD.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN('CORP. REVENUE','UNKNOWN')*/
 
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV WHERE RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY>0
       AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') NCA1 ON  DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY    
       AND NCA1.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
       AND (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0   OR NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL) 
 
 /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY CH_NONAPLD ON CH_NONAPLD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            = NCA1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY              
    AND CH_NONAPLD.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN('CORP. REVENUE','UNKNOWN')*/
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1 ON NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV ON COALESCE( NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY,NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY/*,DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY)  = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY */
 
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV ON  NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY*/
 WHERE DIST.SS_CODE NOT IN  ('CDC','CG','QTC','BV','OOD','1C')
 AND DIST.SOURCE_CODE <> 'RT'

SELECT 
 DIST.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
 ,DIST.SS_CODE 
 ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
                    WHEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY
                    ELSE -8888
                 END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
 ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
                                 ELSE -8888
                 END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,
 ( CASE WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT        NULL THEN  NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    WHEN NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY <0 AND NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL THEN  DIST.DEFAULT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ELSE 73106 END) AS SLS_TERRITORY_KEY
 
 
 ,( CASE WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
 ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
 ,NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER 
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE
 ,-9999 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT /*ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED  DIST 
 
 LEFT OUTER    JOIN     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN ASN   
 ON DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=ASN.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /* CHANGED TO DIST FROM N_AR_TRX_LINE*/
 
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV WHERE RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
 AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') NCA
 ON  ASN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND CAST(NCA.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
 AND NCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
 
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 /*AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NCA.SS_CD*/ /* Deferred_revenue */
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV
 ON NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 
 WHERE DIST.SS_CODE IN ('OOD','1C')
 AND DIST.SOURCE_CODE <> 'RT'

SELECT 
  DIST.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,DIST.SS_CODE 
  ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
      WHEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
      WHEN NSOL2.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL2.SALES_ORDER_KEY
      WHEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     ELSE -7777
  END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
  
  ,(CASE  WHEN (NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT          NULL) THEN  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
      WHEN NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
      WHEN (NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT                  NULL) THEN  NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
      ELSE -7777
  END ) AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
  
  ,(CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
      WHEN NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
      WHEN (NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0) THEN NCA1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    
      ELSE 73106   
  END)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  
  ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      WHEN NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA2.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      WHEN NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN CAST((NCA1.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
  ,COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL2.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 , DIST.SOURCE_CODE
   ,COALESCE(EORCTLOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999) /*Added ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
   ,DIST.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of Meraki Q3FY19 changes */
  FROM    $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED DIST
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC ON SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DIST.SS_CODE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = DIST.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
     AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID   AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL2 ON NSOL2.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID   AND NSOL2.SS_CODE = DIST.ORIG_SS_CD 
  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV WHERE RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
        AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') NCA ON  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
     AND CAST(NCA.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
     AND NCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
     
  
  /*LEFT OUTER    JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY CH_APLD  ON CH_APLD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            = NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
     AND CH_APLD.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN('CORP. REVENUE','UNKNOWN')*/
  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV WHERE RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY>0
        AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') NCA1 ON  DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY    
        AND NCA1.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
        AND (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0   OR NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL) 
        
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV WHERE RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
     AND (END_TV_DTM ) = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') NCA2 ON  NSOL2.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NCA2.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
     AND CAST(NCA2.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
     AND NCA2.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('Direct Sales','L')
        
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1 ON NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  
  /*ADDED BELOW JOINS TO RESTRICT XAAS DATA */
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
      ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY)
   
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
      ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   WHERE DIST.SS_CODE IN ('CG','CDC')
  AND   DIST.SOURCE_CODE NOT IN (  'RT' , 'ACCRUALS','ACCRUALS_OM','REBATES') /* Changed as part of Accruals Q3FY19*/
  AND  DIST.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY < 0       
 /*AND NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS')*/
 AND (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL */
 /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING','OM-FBINV') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))/*ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL */ /*Added As part of TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 )
 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */

SELECT 
 DIST.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
 ,DIST.SS_CODE
                     
 ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
     WHEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     WHEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    ELSE (CASE WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'QTC' THEN -9999 WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'BV' THEN -8888 END ) 
 END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
 
 ,(CASE  WHEN (NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT          NULL) THEN  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
     WHEN (NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  > 0  AND  NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT                  NULL) THEN  NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
     ELSE  (CASE WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'QTC' THEN -9999 WHEN DIST.SS_CODE  = 'BV' THEN -8888 END ) 
 END ) AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY        
 
 ,(CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
     WHEN (NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0) THEN NCA1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    
     ELSE  73106   
 END)  AS SLS_TERRITORY_KEY
 
 ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
     WHEN NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN CAST((NCA1.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
 ,COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER 
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME 
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER 
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE

	CASE NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD 
	WHEN 'REVENUE' THEN ( NXOA.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT + NXOA.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT  ) 
	ELSE 0 
END AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMOUNT , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP( 0 ) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,

	AND NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD IN ( 'UNEARNED_REVENUE' , 'REVENUE' ) 
	AND WGDD.SOURCE_CODE IN ( 'XAAS' , 'OM','OPL' ) 
	INNER JOIN

SELECT 
  DIST.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,DIST.SS_CODE 
  ,CASE WHEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
      WHEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY
      WHEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 THEN DIST.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     ELSE -7777
  END AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
  
  ,(CASE  WHEN (NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT          NULL) THEN  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
           WHEN (NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT                  NULL) THEN  NCA1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
      ELSE -7777
  END ) AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
  
  ,(CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
           WHEN (NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0) THEN NCA1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    
      ELSE 73106   
  END)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  
  ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      WHEN NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN CAST((NCA1.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT

  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME

 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
 ,DIST.SOURCE_CODE
    ,COALESCE(EORCTLOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT , -9999) /*Added ICPM DEFREV JUNECDR*/
  FROM    $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED DIST

  ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = DIST.PARENT_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID    
     AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
  ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID   
  AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

     AND CAST(NCA.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'

      ELSE -7777
  END ) AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
  
  ,(CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT       NULL THEN  NCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
           WHEN (NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0) THEN NCA1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    
      ELSE 73106   
  END)  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  
  ,( CASE  WHEN NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0  AND  NCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL THEN  CAST((NCA.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      WHEN NCA1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN CAST((NCA1.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 1.000000 END) AS SLS_COMM_PCT
  ,COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME

  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME 
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER

  NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD , C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,
  CASE NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD 
  WHEN 'REVENUE' THEN ( NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT  + NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT  )  
  ELSE 0 
 END AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMOUNT , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP( 0 ) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   NROL.PRODUCT_KEY,
   NROL.GL_DT
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED WGDD 
  ON NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT = WGDD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT 
  AND NROL.PRODUCT_KEY=WGDD.PRODUCT_KEY
   AND NROL.GL_DT=CAST(WGDD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE)
  AND NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD IN ( 'UNEARNED_REVENUE' , 'REVENUE' ) 
  AND WGDD.SOURCE_CODE IN ('REBATES') 
  INNER JOIN 
  ( 
  SELECT NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT, NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY, BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,PRODUCT_KEY,GL_DT
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL, 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLCC 
  WHERE NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = GLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR
  WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME)
  IN ('CISCO RESIDUAL ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US')  
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) C
  ON NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT = C.SK_TRX_ID_INT
  AND NROL.PRODUCT_KEY=C.PRODUCT_KEY
   AND NROL.GL_DT=C.GL_DT
  AND NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = C.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT ,
  NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD,NROL.PRODUCT_KEY,NROL.GL_DT
 ORDER BY NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT ,NROL.PRODUCT_KEY,NROL.GL_DT, C.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ) =1
